title: SU women's lax grinds past Loyola, advances to second-round of NCAA Tournament
summary: Syracuse University women's lacrosse team advanced to the second round of the NCAA Tournament after defeating Loyola with a strong defensive performance. The team will remain in Annapolis for weekend tournament play. This article has no direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations or innovation initiatives.
